content_body: We stayed in the lodge “Rustic Elegance”. A beautiful cabin tucked on to the side of a mountain. It offers breathtaking views and is fully equipped for your stay with family or friends. There are a lot of deer that cross the property and both the outdoor and indoor living areas are elegantly appointed. The beds and bathrooms are comfortable and immaculate. We loved watching TV outside on the deck while enjoying the outdoor fireplace. We are already planning our trip back for next year! There is a lot to do and experience in the surrounding towns. We played Golf at Old Toccoa Farms, visited Mercier Orchard, visited a couple of wineries, attended Oktoberfest in Helen, visited Amacalola Falls and even took a fishing charter through Welch’s Guide Service on Notterly Lake. It was a perfect vacation and Cabin Rentals of Georgia provided the perfect accommodations.
title: A Most Perfect Blue Ridge Cabin Rental
